name: Marcus Johnson
about: 3 years in elevated contemporary at Rag & Bone and Theory. Retailers highlight his deep product knowledge and ability to connect with style-conscious customers. Consistently requested for new collection launches.
interviewTranscript: I'm big into fashion, so I loved working at Nike. I love seeing people try on shoes, I love coming in with shoes that I like that the store doesn't sell, so people always ask me how I got them. I had to put together all the outfits for people, see what worked well, try to get people to buy the outfits I think look good. I love retail, I love clothes, I love the customer interaction. I think that translates well to any environment—I just want to help people feel good about what they're wearing.
